query:
-- Tipo de produto
SELECT tipo, incentivado,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limpos,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY tipo, incentivado, universo
ORDER BY tipo, universo, incentivado;

  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limpos,
  CASE WHEN indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 'IPCA+' ELSE 'DI+' END as universo
